title: taraxacum langeanum
intro: Taraxacum langeanum, commonly known as the Lange's dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion genus. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing cholesterol levels, improving liver function, and acting as a natural diuretic. Taraxacum langeanum can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in salves and poultices for topical application.
